## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential brand refresh and website redesign for GrowthX and a new community platform, exploring collaboration between GrowthX and Noboringdesign.](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX seeks brand refresh and new community platform design; Noboringdesign recommends tackling main brand first](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Typical brand refresh process: 4-6 weeks; full rebrand + website dev: 4-6 months, \~$60-65k](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Current GrowthX site built on Next.js; Noboringdesign works exclusively in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Existing informal partnership (GrowthX providing SEO/content for Noboringdesign) complicates pricing; needs clarification](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

## Topics

### Current GrowthX Situation and Needs

  - [Jason: new head of GoToMarket (2 weeks), owns website](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Announcing Series A in \~1-1.5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Immediate needs: update copy, new pages for existing site](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Long-term: brand refresh for GrowthX, new brand for AI/marketing community](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Noboringdesign's Branding Process

  - [4-6 week timeline for brand refresh](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Phases: kickoff, visual audit, mood boards, concept creation, visual identity development, brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Success factors: quick client feedback, clear initial direction](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Website Development Considerations

  - [GrowthX site: Next.js, blog on Strapi (headless CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Noboringdesign works exclusively in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Webflow advantage: client can easily update/replicate pages post-development](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Project Scope and Pricing

  - [Full rebrand + website dev: 4-6 months, typically $60-65k](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Current informal partnership: GrowthX providing \~$6.5k worth of SEO/content work](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Need to clarify exact scope and value exchange](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### Community Platform Considerations

  - [Initially separate from GrowthX brand](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Recommendation: align with refreshed GrowthX brand](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Example: Exit 5 project (sales community) - took \~3 months for rebrand + website](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### Immediate Next Steps for Series A Launch

  - [GrowthX to create scrappy pages using current templates](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Noboringdesign can potentially help with announcement template](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to discuss with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) re: scope, budget, and partnership details](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Jason to provide Noboringdesign with desired scope for GrowthX rebrand and community platform](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Clarify current GrowthX-Noboringdesign partnership terms and value exchange](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Consider transition to Webflow for GrowthX website](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to plan engagement, set deadlines and timelines](https://fathom.video/share/o2CCWqqw4ex-hx5CCTvqAo9ok_26Ay38?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
